findings.evidence: In the PDF, the Governor, Date, and Director info are laid out in a single horizontal row. In the HTML, the Date is placed on a new line below the Governor and Director info.
In the PDF, the list of roles is aligned in a block to the right of the 'ATTENTION:' label. In the HTML, the roles are listed on new lines below the label.
The state seal is centered at the top of the PDF page, but it is left-aligned in the HTML.
The signature image in the HTML is rendered as white text on a black background, whereas the PDF shows black text on a white/transparent background.
